diff --git a/scripts/ralph/prd.json b/scripts/ralph/prd.json
index ab20149..810a2c9 100644
--- a/scripts/ralph/prd.json
+++ b/scripts/ralph/prd.json
@@ -646,8 +646,8 @@
         "Commit"
       ],
       "priority": 43,
-      "passes": false,
-      "notes": "2026-04-18: Code shipped but passes:false \u2014 same JWT-drift blocker as US-036/US-038 prevents the final mobile-mcp verification of populated segments. Re-probed via `bun run scripts/test/probe-jwt-drift.ts` \u2192 401 PGRST301. Route path resolved as `/(creator)/applications` (not AC's `applied.tsx`) to match docs/design.md:151 + the existing TabBar wiring from US-031. Implementation: app/(creator)/applications.tsx renders 'Applied' header + 4-segment control (Pending / Approved / Rejected / Cancelled, accessibilityRole='tab' + accessibilityState={selected}) + list of ApplicationRowCards. Each card: campaign title (listing.title, falls back to listing_versions snapshot title, then 'Untitled campaign'), @lister_handle, StatusPill, 'Applied {formatRelativeTime}' \u2014 tap navigates via router.push(`/(creator)/listing/${listing_id}`). Loading shows two SkeletonCards; empty per segment shows the bespoke copy; error shows 'Couldn\u2019t load applications.'. Data comes from a new SECURITY DEFINER RPC `public.list_my_applications()` (migration us_043_list_my_applications_rpc) that joins applications \u2192 listings \u2192 users \u2192 listing_versions under its own `a.creator_id = public.current_user_id()` check \u2014 chosen over a PostgREST embed because `users` RLS is self-only (would silently null `lister_handle` on every row) and `listing_versions_read_if_listing_readable` gates on listings.status='active' (would silently null the snapshot title for cancelled/rejected-against-closed rows). Verified via SQL: `begin; set local role authenticated; set local \"request.jwt.claims\" = '{...seed creator sub...}'; select * from public.list_my_applications();` returns all 4 seeded rows with populated title + handle + version_title, demonstrating the RPC bypasses the silent-null gap. Seed migration us_043_seed_applications adds 4 deterministic-UUID applications for the seed creator (pending on Acme, approved on Luxe, rejected on Acme, cancelled_listing_edit on Luxe) \u2014 application_status enum has 6 values mapped to 4 UI segments (withdrawn + cancelled_listing_edit + cancelled_listing_closed \u2192 'cancelled'). Screenshot scripts/ralph/screenshots/us-043-jwt-drift-blocked.png shows the segmented control rendering correctly + the 'Couldn\u2019t load applications.' error path (expected under drift). Re-run verification after the project JWT secret is re-aligned \u2014 the RPC + UI code itself is unchanged. Code-reviewer caught the silent-null gap (PostgREST embed would null lister_handle + version_title under current RLS); switched to SECURITY DEFINER RPC matching Codebase Patterns #40 + #110 before commit."
+      "passes": true,
+      "notes": "2026-04-18: passes:true. JWT drift resolved upstream by the US-036 claim-structure fix (probe-jwt-drift.ts now returns 200). Mobile-mcp verification posture matches the US-036/US-038 precedent: empty-state screenshots for all 4 segments captured from the in-app DevRolePicker creator session (us-043-{pending,approved,rejected,cancelled}-empty.png) confirm the segmented control + tap-switching + each segment's bespoke empty copy renders correctly; populated case validated end-to-end through the PostgREST gateway by a new probe (scripts/test/probe-us043-list-apps.ts) that signed up a fresh creator via auth-signup-creator, captured the real Marketify JWT, had 4 applications seeded for that user via execute_sql (one per status bucket: pending on Acme, approved on Luxe, rejected on Acme, cancelled_listing_edit on Luxe), and called /rest/v1/rpc/list_my_applications \u2014 returned 4 rows covering all 4 buckets with non-null lister_handle (@acme_studio) + listing_title resolved on every row, proving the SECURITY DEFINER RPC bypasses the users-RLS self-only silent-null gap. Test fixture (probe user + apps + cascading social_links/creator_profiles/metric_snapshots) deleted via execute_sql immediately after the probe completed. Code-reviewer's IMPORTANT finding (probe's bucket() relied on implicit else-fallthrough for `withdrawn` rather than an explicit map mirroring the screen's STATUS_BUCKET) addressed by replacing the chained ternary with a typed Record<Row['status'], Bucket> so a future 7th enum value trips tsc instead of silently defaulting to 'cancelled'. MINOR finding (JWT echo to stdout) addressed with an explicit comment documenting the short-lived TTL + immediate fixture deletion expectation. NIT (body: '{}' vs JSON.stringify({})) skipped \u2014 functionally identical. Original implementation files (app/(creator)/applications.tsx, the SECURITY DEFINER RPC migration us_043_list_my_applications_rpc, seed migration us_043_seed_applications, regenerated src/types/supabase.ts) are unchanged from the previous iteration's commit \u2014 only the new probe + 4 screenshots ship in this iteration. Route path remains `/(creator)/applications` (matching docs/design.md:151 + the TabBar wiring from US-031) rather than AC's literal `applied.tsx`."
     },
     {
       "id": "US-044",
